name: PDF.co
description: PDF.co — REST API for PDF creation, conversion, splitting, merging, OCR, and data extraction.

seo.title: PDF.co — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PDF.co: PDF.co — REST API for PDF creation, conversion, splitting, merging, OCR, and data extraction.

when_to_use: REST API for PDF creation, OCR, and data extraction at scale
Splitting and merging PDFs in automated document workflows
Barcode and form field extraction from scanned documents
HTML to PDF conversion with JavaScript rendering support
PDF processing integrated into Zapier or Make automations

pros: One API covers PDF gen, OCR, parsing, extraction
Good fit for RPA and spreadsheet automation
cons: API response quality varies by operation
Docs feel scattered across many endpoints
Rate limits surprise you on cheaper plans
review.verdict: Jack-of-all-trades PDF API — broad coverage at low price, but specialist tools win on depth.
review.best_for: Indie devs, no-code builders, and RPA teams needing many PDF operations cheaply.
review.not_for: Regulated enterprises or teams needing deep customization.
